content_fingerprint: hugging face adds auto generated agents md endpoints to all gradio spaces every gradio space on hugging face now automatically exposes a machine readable agents md endpoint allowing ai coding agents to discover and interact with spaces without manual configuration hugging face has quietly rolled out a major usability upgrade for its gradio spaces platform every space now automatically serves an agents md endpoint the endpoint provides a structured machine readable description of what the space does and how it can be called eliminating the need for developers to hand write agent integration doc
